StyledText.Data: View IOs in Title <<TF TT Header::Text>>

Calculation.Text: "View all media with subtitles in title"
"View all text styles defined in title"

StyledText.Data: The list is used in the following IOs. Lists can also be used as IO List and in IO Fields. Click IO to view details.

Calculation.Text: "This IO is used " & FAT IO::Number of instances & " times in the Title."
